title: codereview-P2: SenML examples use inconsistent field names (drop_type vs type); standardize on SenML conventions from position-sharing section
description: In 12-apps.md:18.9 use 'n':'type' to match 18.2 position SenML examples. Update LCI example too (though now shortened). Ensures cross-implementation consistency with test vectors.
close_reason: Fixed: standardized SenML field from drop_type to type to match position-sharing examples in 18.2
